title: Congratulations! Mr. Akhil Thakur for qualifying Himachal Pradesh Administrative Service (HAS) Exam.
content: Jan, 09 2025 Congratulations! Mr. Akhil Thakur for qualifying Himachal Pradesh Administrative Service (HAS) Exam. JUIT Alumni Mr. Akhil Thakur (Batch 2017) has qualified Himachal Pradesh Administrative Service (HAS) Exam. He graduated in 2017 from the Electronics and Communication Engineering branch of JUIT. JUIT family wishes him the very best as he embarks on this new and impactful journey in public service. Download <
